max_advance_booking_days.description: Maximum days in advance a booking can be made

default_confirmation_mode.description: Default confirmation mode for new resources (auto or manual)

default_slot_duration_minutes.description: Default slot duration for new resources

max_bookings_per_user_per_day.description: Maximum bookings a user can make per day

min_lead_time_hours.description: Minimum hours in advance a booking must be made

cancellation_grace_period_hours.description: How many hours before the booking's start time a user may still cancel or reschedule. Applies to both pending and confirmed bookings.

enable_recurring_bookings.description: Allow users to create recurring bookings (experimental)
